title: Malaysia Sole Proprietorship/Partnership Business Registration (Form A, Borang A)
description: Form A ("Borang A"), the statutory application through which a person responsible for a new sole proprietorship or partnership registers the business with the Registrar of Businesses, made under Rule 3 of the Registration of Businesses Rules 1957 (First Schedule) and required by section 5 of the Registration of Businesses Act 1956 (Act 197). Act 197 s.5(1) requires the person responsible for a business to apply for registration not later than thirty days from the date of the commencement of the business. This is Malaysia's separate business-name/sole-trader-and-partnership registry (administered today by Suruhanjaya Syarikat Malaysia, SSM, as successor Registrar of Businesses under the Companies Commission of Malaysia Act 2001) — distinct from SSM's other, company (Companies Act 2016) incorporation regime, whose own "Superform" specimen a prior GovSchema cycle (GOV-1774) examined and rejected as a zero-AcroForm-field, too-thin specimen printout. Scope: this schema models ONLY Form A, the first-registration form. Form A1 ("Permohonan Pembaharuan Pendaftaran Perniagaan" / renewal of an existing registration, Rule 5) and Form B ("Pendaftaran Perubahan-Perubahan Dalam Perniagaan" / registration of changes to an already-registered business, Rule 6) are printed on the same First Schedule page as Form A's own siblings but are a distinct renewal transaction and a distinct amendment transaction respectively, and are out of scope of this document — see VERIFICATION.md. Form A's own printed layout carries a single Owner's/Partner's Particulars block (items 1-10); this schema likewise models a single owner/partner's particulars, disclosed in VERIFICATION.md as a scope limit for a partnership with more than one partner (GovSchema's v0.3 spec line has no repeating/array field type, GSP-0009, not yet folded in). GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Malaysia or Suruhanjaya Syarikat Malaysia.

authority.name: Suruhanjaya Syarikat Malaysia (Companies Commission of Malaysia)

source.documentRef: Form A (Borang A, Kaedah 3/Rule 3), First Schedule to the Registration of Businesses Rules 1957 (P.U.(A) 282/1957/L.N. 282/57), made under the Registration of Businesses Act 1956 (Act 197, Revised 1979)

verification.notes: GOV-1938: GovSchema Standard Research cycle, closing Malaysia's Business Formation gap (its sole remaining open, unscreened vertical after DMV/Passport/Visa — GOV-1774/GOV-1783/GOV-1789). A prior cycle (GOV-1774) had already searched for and failed to find a live, directly downloadable copy of SSM's own 'Form A' sole-proprietorship form, leaving only the Companies Act 2016 s.14 'Superform' (rejected as a zero-AcroForm-field, too-thin specimen) screened for this vertical. This cycle located Form A published directly and unauthenticated on ssm.com.my as the First Schedule to the Registration of Businesses Rules 1957 (a different statute, Act 197, from the Companies Act 2016 regime the rejected Superform belongs to), fetched it fresh, and cross-read the parent Act 197 for registration-deadline/legal-grounding context. See VERIFICATION.md for the full source re-fetch record, field-by-field provenance, and every disclosed scope/judgment call (including the two undecoded 'Kod (2)' internal SSM code boxes, the single owner/partner particulars block, and the deferred Form A1/B siblings).

fields.name: businessName
fields.label: Nama perniagaan (Huruf Besar)
fields.description: The business name, in block/capital letters.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, 'Nama perniagaan (Huruf Besar) / Business name (Block Letters)'

fields.name: businessNameChinese
fields.label: Jika nama Cina tuliskan dengan huruf Cina
fields.description: The business name in Chinese characters, if the business name is Chinese.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, 'Jika nama Cina tuliskan dengan huruf Cina / If such name is Chinese give name in Chinese Character'

fields.name: dateOfCommencement
fields.label: Tarikh permulaan
fields.description: The date the business commenced (or will commence) operating. Act 197 s.5(1) requires the person responsible for the business to apply for this registration not later than thirty days from this date.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, 'Tarikh permulaan / Date of commencement'

fields.name: constitutionOfBusiness
fields.label: Bentuk perniagaan
fields.description: The legal constitution of the business being registered.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, 'Bentuk perniagaan / Constitution of Business' checkboxes: 'Kepunyaan Tunggal/Sole Proprietorship', 'Perkongsian/Partnership'

fields.name: writtenPartnershipAgreementExists
fields.label: Sebutkan jika ada suatu perjanjian bertulis berkenaan dengan syarat-syarat perkongsian itu
fields.description: Whether there is a written agreement as to the terms of the partnership. The form prints this Ya/Yes-Tidak/No question unconditionally, but it is only meaningful for a partnership; this schema gates it to constitutionOfBusiness being 'partnership' as a disclosed judgment call, not a printed conditional on the form itself — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, 'State whether there is a written agreement as to the term of the partnership. If so, give date and attach a copy of the agreement verified by signatures.' checkboxes: 'Ya/Yes', 'Tidak/No'

fields.name: partnershipAgreementDate
fields.label: Tarikh
fields.description: The date of the written partnership agreement, required when one exists.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, 'Tarikh / Date' (directly beneath the written-partnership-agreement Ya/Yes-Tidak/No line)

fields.name: principalPlaceOfBusinessAddress
fields.label: Tempat Utama perniagaan
fields.description: The address of the principal place of the business.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, 'Tempat Utama perniagaan / Principal place of the business'

fields.name: principalPlaceOfBusinessCode
fields.label: Kod (2)
fields.description: A 2-character code printed in a narrow column directly beside the principal-place-of-business address row. Neither Form A, the Registration of Businesses Rules 1957, nor the Registration of Businesses Act 1956 explains this code's meaning anywhere in the source text examined; it is modelled as an optional free-form 1-2 character value rather than a fabricated closed enum — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, 'Kod (2)' column beside 'Tempat Utama perniagaan / Principal place of the business'

fields.name: postalAddress
fields.label: Alamat Pos
fields.description: The business's postal address, if different from the principal place of business.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, 'Alamat Pos / Postal Address'

fields.name: natureOfBusinessPrimary
fields.label: Jenis perniagaan sebenar dijalankan sekarang
fields.description: The actual nature of the business currently carried on, e.g. 'Restoran'/'Restaurant', 'Kedai Runcit'/'Provisions Shop', per the form's own example.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, 'Jenis perniagaan sebenar dijalankan sekarang / Actual nature of the business carrying on now', first of up to 8 blank lines printed on the source

fields.name: natureOfBusinessSecondary
fields.label: Jenis perniagaan sebenar dijalankan sekarang (2)
fields.description: A second nature-of-business activity, if the business carries on more than one. Form A's own printed layout provides up to 8 blank lines for this purpose; this schema models the first two as a bounded convention (no repeating/array field type in this spec line, GSP-0009) — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, second of up to 8 blank lines beneath 'Jenis perniagaan sebenar dijalankan sekarang / Actual nature of the business carrying on now'

fields.name: natureOfBusinessCode
fields.label: Kod (2)
fields.description: A 2-character code printed beside the nature-of-business lines, inside a small bordered box. Its caption 'Kod (2)' is printed twice in the source's own raw layout (once above and once below the bordered box), which this schema reads as one code value rather than two distinct codes — its precise meaning (e.g. an internal SSM business-classification code) is not explained anywhere in the source text examined; modelled as an optional free-form value, not a fabricated closed enum — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, 'Kod (2)' bordered box beside 'Jenis perniagaan sebenar dijalankan sekarang / Actual nature of the business carrying on now'

fields.name: businessBranches
fields.label: Cawangan-cawangan perniagaan
fields.description: Branches of the business, if any, as a free-text list (the source prints up to 4 blank lines for this purpose).
fields.sourceRef: Form A, 'Cawangan-cawangan perniagaan / Branches of the business'

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Bertarikh
fields.description: The date the declaration is signed by the sole proprietor or a principal partner of the business.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, 'Bertarikh pada .... haribulan .... 19.... / Dated this .... day of .... 19....', beside 'Tandatangan / Signature'

fields.name: ownerOrPartnerName
fields.label: 1. Nama Pemilik/Ahli Kongsi
fields.description: The name of the owner or partner. Form A's own printed layout carries a single Owner's/Partner's Particulars block (items 1-10); this schema models exactly one owner/partner's particulars, disclosed in VERIFICATION.md as a scope limit for a partnership of more than one partner.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, Owner's/Partner's Particulars, item 1 'Nama Pemilik/Ahli Kongsi / Name of Owner/Partner'

fields.name: ownerOrPartnerResidentialAddress
fields.label: 2. Alamat Rumah
fields.description: The residential address of the owner/partner.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, Owner's/Partner's Particulars, item 2 'Alamat Rumah / Residential Address'

fields.name: ownerOrPartnerChineseName
fields.label: 3. Jika nama Cina, Tuliskan Huruf Cina
fields.description: The owner/partner's name in Chinese characters, if it is a Chinese name.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, Owner's/Partner's Particulars, item 3 'Jika nama Cina, Tuliskan Huruf Cina / If Chinese Name, Chinese Characters'

fields.name: ownerOrPartnerIdentificationType
fields.label: 4. No.Kad Pengenalan/Paspot
fields.description: Whether the owner/partner's identification number below is a passport number or a Malaysian identity card (Kad Pengenalan) number.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, Owner's/Partner's Particulars, item 4 'No.Kad Pengenalan/Paspot / I.C./Passport No.' options 'Paspot/Passport', 'Kad Pengenalan/Identity Card'

fields.name: ownerOrPartnerIdentificationNumber
fields.label: 4. No.Kad Pengenalan/Paspot
fields.description: The owner/partner's passport number or identity card number, per the type selected in ownerOrPartnerIdentificationType.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, Owner's/Partner's Particulars, item 4 'No.Kad Pengenalan/Paspot / I.C./Passport No.'

fields.name: ownerOrPartnerAssociationEventDate
fields.label: 5. Tarikh/Date of
fields.description: The date of the association event named in ownerOrPartnerAssociationEventType (e.g. the date of entry into the business).
fields.sourceRef: Form A, Owner's/Partner's Particulars, item 5 'Tarikh/Date of'

fields.name: ownerOrPartnerPositionOrAssociationNature
fields.label: 6. Butir Jawatan Tertentu Dipegang atau Cara Perkaitan dengan Perniagaan
fields.description: The particular position held, or the nature of the owner/partner's association with the business.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, Owner's/Partner's Particulars, item 6 'Butir Jawatan Tertentu Dipegang atau Cara Perkaitan dengan Perniagaan / Particular Position Held or Nature of Association with Business'

fields.name: ownerOrPartnerAssociationEventType
fields.label: 6. (checkboxes)
fields.description: The nature of the change in the owner/partner's association with the business being reported by this filing.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, Owner's/Partner's Particulars, item 6 checkboxes: 'Masuk/Entry', 'Pertukaran/Change', 'Menarik Diri/Withdrawal', 'Kematian/Death', 'Sukarela/Voluntary', 'Lain-lain/Others'

fields.name: ownerOrPartnerPercentageShare
fields.label: Peratus Saham Perniagaan
fields.description: The owner/partner's percentage share of the business.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, Owner's/Partner's Particulars, 'Peratus Saham Perniagaan / Percentage Share of Business' (same row as item 6)

fields.name: ownerOrPartnerRace
fields.label: 7. Bangsa
fields.description: The owner/partner's race.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, Owner's/Partner's Particulars, item 7 'Bangsa/Race' checkboxes: 'Melayu/Malay', 'China/Chinese', 'India/Indian', 'Lain-lain/Others'

fields.name: ownerOrPartnerNationality
fields.label: 8. Kewarganegaraan
fields.description: The owner/partner's nationality.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, Owner's/Partner's Particulars, item 8 'Kewarganegaraan/Nationality'

fields.name: ownerOrPartnerDateOfBirth
fields.label: 9. Tarikh Lahir
fields.description: The owner/partner's date of birth (Hari Bl. Th. / Day Mo. Yr.).
fields.sourceRef: Form A, Owner's/Partner's Particulars, item 9 'Tarikh Lahir / Date of Birth'

fields.name: ownerOrPartnerSex
fields.label: 10. Jantina
fields.description: The owner/partner's sex.
fields.sourceRef: Form A, Owner's/Partner's Particulars, item 10 'Jantina/Sex' checkboxes: 'Laki-laki/Male', 'Perempuan/Female'

documents.label: Certified copy of the written partnership agreement
documents.sourceRef: Form A, 'If so, give date and attach a copy of the agreement verified by signatures.'

documents.label: Signature of the sole proprietor or a principal partner
documents.issuingAuthority: Self-attested by the sole proprietor or a principal partner of the business
documents.sourceRef: Form A, 'Tandatangan / Signature', with the printed instruction '(Hendaklah ditandatangani oleh tuan punya tunggal atau seorang kongsi utama perniagaan itu) / (Should be signed by the sole-proprietor or principal partner of the business)'

documents.label: Verification by associates
documents.statement: Saya/Kami yang bertandatangan di bawah ini mengesahkan bahawa segala kenyataan-kenyataan yang dibuat dalam borang ini adalah tepat dan mengaku bahawa saya/kami adalah sekutu-sekutu dalam perniagaan yang bernama .............................................. / I/We the understand confirm the accuracy of all the statements made in the form and declare that I/We am an/are associate(s) of the business the mane of which is ..................................................................................
documents.sourceRef: Form A, 'PENGESAHAN OLEH SEKUTU-SEKUTU / VERIFICATION BY ASSOCIATES', requiring the full name(s) and identity card number(s)/colour of each associate and their signature(s)/right thumbprint(s) and date; this schema models it as unconditionally required, since the form prints it without a visible conditional gate — see VERIFICATION.md for the disclosed ambiguity as to its literal applicability to a single-owner sole proprietorship.

documents.label: Certification by a verifying officer that the associates' signatures/thumbprints were affixed in their presence
documents.issuingAuthority: An authorised verifying officer: within Malaysia, a Judge, President of a Sessions Court, Magistrate, Notary Public, Justice of the Peace, Advocate or Solicitor, Member of Parliament or a State Legislative Assembly or State Executive Council, Commissioner for Oaths, Commissioner for Labour, Chinese Affairs Officer, District Officer, or an officer authorised by the Commissioner for Labour or District Officer; within the Commonwealth, an equivalent officer entitled to practise there or a Consular Officer; outside the Commonwealth, a Notary Public, Consular Officer, or Diplomatic Officer performing consular functions
documents.statement: Saya mengaku bahawa tandatangan (2)/cap (2) ibu jari kanan di atas ...................................... telah diturunkan pada akuan di atas ini di hadapan saya setelah saya berpuashati bahawa orang-orang yang menurunkan tandatangan (2)/cap (2) ibu jari kanan itu adalah sebenarnya orang-orang yang namanya tersebut dalam akuan itu dan ia/mereka faham maksud akuan itu. / I certify that the signature(s)/right thumb print(s) above ................................ was/were affixed to the above declaration in my presence after I had satisfied myself that the person(s) so affixing such signature(s)/right thumb print(s) was/were in fact the person(s) named in such declaration and understood the purport of such declaration.
documents.sourceRef: Form A, verifying-officer certification block beneath 'PENGESAHAN OLEH SEKUTU-SEKUTU / VERIFICATION BY ASSOCIATES', with the 'CATATAN/NOTE' list of authorised verifying-officer categories

steps.title: Business name, commencement date, and constitution
Place of business, nature of business, and branches
Dated declaration by the sole proprietor/principal partner
